title: FIRST EPSS Bulk
description:
FIRST EPSS (Exploit Prediction Scoring System) is a data-driven effort for estimating the likelihood that a software vulnerability will be exploited in the wild. The EPSS model produces a probability score between 0 and 1, helping organizations prioritize vulnerability remediation based on actual exploitation likelihood.

This connector performs a bulk import of EPSS scores for all CVEs from the FIRST EPSS dataset and updates the corresponding Vulnerability objects in OpenCTI with their current EPSS score and percentile.
short_description: Bulk imports EPSS (Exploit Prediction Scoring System) scores from FIRST for all CVEs and updates the corresponding Vulnerability objects in OpenCTI with exploitation likelihood scores.
